title: Fixing Inconsistent CSS Class Name Conflicts

statement.markdown: You are given a string of CSS styles with multiple classes and their corresponding properties. The classes are defined with a prefix followed by a unique identifier. However, the prefix is not properly handled, leading to inconsistent class name conflicts. Your task is to correct the class name conflicts by properly handling the prefix and resolving the class names.
statement.inputFormat: A string of CSS styles with multiple classes and their corresponding properties
statement.outputFormat: A string of corrected CSS styles with consistent class name conflicts
statement.notes: Assume that the input string is well-formed and does not contain any syntax errors

examples.explanation: The class name conflict is resolved by applying the latest property to the class

hints.text: Use a hash map to store the properties of each class
